strategic_assessment: The handoff document is concise and clearly outlines its objectives, but contains hallucinated hardware engineering concepts completely unrelated to the Prolix molecular dynamics explicit solvent project.

concerns.issue: Cycle 83 & 84 Fixes refer to 'Bandwidth-Throughput' audits and 'ECC correction hardware manifest'. These are hardware concepts that are entirely irrelevant to the Prolix Explicit Solvent Validation Plan.
concerns.recommendation: Remove hardware-related terminology from the Cycle 83 & 84 accomplishments. Replace them with the actual molecular dynamics/software-related fixes applied during those cycles.
